board_policy.title: Vendor commitment board notification
board_policy.text: Any single vendor commitment above $150K annualized requires board notification before signing.

board_policy.title: Vendor competitive review value
board_policy.text: Vendor contracts over $100,000 per year must be competitively reviewed before renewal.

board_policy.title: Vendor competitive review window
board_policy.text: High-value vendor contracts must be competitively reviewed at least 60 days before their renewal date.

board_policy.title: Minimum runway guardrail
board_policy.text: Maintain at least 9 months runway unless a signed financing term sheet is in hand.

board_policy.title: Headcount funding basis
board_policy.text: New headcount must map to signed revenue, security compliance, or runway-positive automation.
